summary: SINGLE_FOCUS 'Bayes in odds form' lesson. Top MathTex formula: posterior odds = prior odds × Bayes factor. 3-row table: BLUE prior (1/99 odds ≈ 1%), GREEN 'x10' multiplier annotated by GREEN Arrow with Bayes-factor label, PURPLE posterior (≈ 0.101 odds ≈ 9.2%). Bottom 3-line narration explains: 1% prior, 10× likelihood ratio, counterintuitive 9.2% posterior (not the 90% most people guess).
